_meta.description: Curated editorial themes for Kalshi prediction markets, ranked by Google search demand. Each theme maps to a list of Kalshi series tickers and carries a monthly search-volume estimate. Use `kalshi themes import data/themes_seo.json` to load. Volumes are point-in-time estimates; refresh quarterly.

themes.name: AI Race Milestones
themes.description: Frontier model releases, AI infrastructure, training-compute and AGI predictions

themes.name: Elon Musk / Tesla / SpaceX
themes.description: Musk-empire markets: SpaceX IPO, Starship cadence, Tesla KPIs, Neuralink, wealth

themes.name: Epstein / Celebrity Trials
themes.description: Massive SEO demand but thin Kalshi inventory — flag as STALE

themes.name: Government Dysfunction
themes.description: House Speaker fights, filibuster reform, government shutdowns

themes.name: FDA / Pharma Approvals
themes.description: Drug approvals, psychedelic milestones, FDA commissioner pick

themes.name: Iran Escalation
themes.description: Hormuz traffic, US-Iran nuclear deal, oil & gas price ladders

themes.name: Gaza War Wraps
themes.description: Israel rate decisions, Netanyahu / next PM, post-war politics

themes.name: Trump Survives Politically
themes.description: Approval ratings, midterm dynamics, 25th Amendment / impeachment

themes.name: RFK Jr Changes Health
themes.description: Huge SEO but zero active Kalshi inventory — AVOID

themes.name: Nuclear Renaissance
themes.description: Reactor licenses, criticality milestones, data-center nuclear, fusion

themes.name: Fed Cuts Aggressively
themes.description: Fed meeting decisions, CPI prints, rate-cut paths, mortgage rates

themes.name: SCOTUS Rulings
themes.description: Birthright citizenship, trans sports ban, tariff cases, justice changes

themes.name: Housing / Mortgage Crisis
themes.description: Mortgage rates, new home sales, hedge-fund housing tax, starts

themes.name: US-China Decoupling
themes.description: Tariffs, chip export controls, Taiwan posture, PRC PMI

themes.name: TikTok Ban
themes.description: Story died — high SEO with zero active inventory. AVOID

themes.name: Immigration Crackdown
themes.description: ICE funding, deportations, border encounters

themes.name: Stock Market Crash / S&P
themes.description: S&P 500 / NASDAQ ranges, unemployment, NBER recession

themes.name: Crypto Regulation
themes.description: Single market, low volume — likely STALE

themes.name: Climate / EV Policy Reversal
themes.description: Truflation EV, IFO sentiment, climate-goal markets

themes.name: No 2026 Recession
themes.description: Unemployment + recession ladders — overlaps Stock Market Crash

themes.name: Russia-Ukraine Ends
themes.description: Zelensky/Putin summit, Russia rate decisions, post-war politics

themes.name: Bitcoin Breakout
themes.description: Deepest crypto inventory: BTC/ETH price ladders, one-touch markets

themes.name: Trump Cabinet Shake-up
themes.description: Hegseth, McConnell, Trump firings, cabinet exits

themes.name: Putin Out
themes.description: Thin inventory — overlaps Russia-Ukraine Ends

themes.name: Weed Rescheduled
themes.description: Thin overlap with FDA/SCOTUS themes
